iterations.changes_made: Initial baseline — no changes applied yet

Iteration 1: Added Wizard decision context, Blue Hat causal hypotheses + simplicity principle, White Hat profile reuse, Black Hat sample size flagging + date gaps, Yellow Hat multi-dimensional segmentation + Simpson's paradox + derived metrics + Metric vs Target + Follow-Up Queue + hedging language + SUGGEST tags, Green Hat mandatory contrarian tests, Summary narrative arc + hypothesis verdict + evaluation table + recommended actions

Iteration 2: Made causal hypothesis mandatory, correlation≠causation distinction, CTE batching + LIMIT enforcement, N+STDDEV in all tables, 2x STDDEV confidence indicator, Risk Impact in Black Hat, averaging warning + Simpson's paradox worked example, worked SUGGEST example, Follow-Up Queue 1-3 per finding, Blue Hat narrative frame, Red Hat working hypothesis, success criteria unconditional

Iteration 3: Added I/O/Constraint contracts to all 6 phases, playbook-loaded-once note, Yellow Hat novelty checkpoint (mandatory), Yellow Hat efficiency rules (mandatory), SUGGEST made mandatory for every threshold violation, Follow-Up Queue promoted to standalone section with P1/P2/P3 priorities, simplicity escalation gates (4 examples: IQR→Z-score, Pearson for <10 cols, date_trunc→decomposition, descriptive→statistical), Summary 4-step narrative scaffolding (Frame/Journey/Twist/Resolution)
iterations.diff_snippets: Best composite across all 4 runs: 35/36. Every metric has achieved 3 at least once except narrative (peaked at 2). Scorer variance (haiku non-determinism) causes 2↔3 oscillation on direction-quality, uncertainty, success-metrics.
